document.title: Command Message
document.summary: A message that tells the receiver to perform an operation. Uses IntegrationEnvelope.Intent = Command.
document.implementation: IntegrationEnvelope with Intent property set to MessageIntent.Command. Processed by ServiceActivator or workflow activities.

document.title: Document Message
document.summary: A message that carries data for the receiver to process. Uses IntegrationEnvelope.Intent = Document.
document.implementation: IntegrationEnvelope with Intent property set to MessageIntent.Document. Payload contains the full data document.

document.title: Event Message
document.summary: A message that notifies receivers about something that happened. Uses IntegrationEnvelope.Intent = Event.
document.implementation: IntegrationEnvelope with Intent property set to MessageIntent.Event. Published to Kafka for fan-out streaming.

document.title: Request-Reply
document.summary: Send a request message and receive a reply message. Correlates request and response via correlation ID.
document.implementation: Processing.RequestReply.RequestReplyCorrelator manages reply correlation using IntegrationEnvelope.CorrelationId and ReplyTo header.

document.title: Return Address
document.summary: The request message contains a return address that indicates where to send the reply.
document.implementation: IntegrationEnvelope.ReplyTo field specifies the reply channel/address.

document.title: Correlation Identifier
document.summary: Each reply message contains a correlation identifier that links it to the original request.
document.implementation: IntegrationEnvelope.CorrelationId — a GUID that links related messages across the pipeline.

document.title: Message Sequence
document.summary: Large data sets are split into a sequence of messages, each carrying a portion of the data.
document.implementation: IntegrationEnvelope.SequenceNumber and TotalCount fields. Processing.Resequencer.MessageResequencer reassembles ordered sequences.

document.title: Message Expiration
document.summary: A message is given a time-to-live; it should be discarded if not consumed before expiry.
document.implementation: IntegrationEnvelope.ExpiresAt timestamp + MessageExpirationChecker that validates TTL before processing.

document.title: Format Indicator
document.summary: Messages include a format indicator so the receiver knows how to parse the data.
document.implementation: MessageHeaders.ContentType header — e.g. application/json, application/xml, text/csv.
